title: Spicy Tomato & Pepper Pasta
summary: Punchy, peppery and done in 20. Our Spicy Tomato & Pepper Sauce is the star of this recipe, making for a delicious bowl of pasta with barely any effort.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Spicy Tomato & Pepper Sauce.
Fill a large saucepan with salted water and bring to the boil. Once boiling, drop in the pasta and cook following pack instructions. Just before draining, scoop out 100ml of the pasta water.

Return the cooked pasta to the pan and set over a medium-high heat. Stir through the Spicy Tomato & Pepper Sauce until hot, loosening with a splash of pasta water if needed. Taste and season, if needed.
Spoon into bowls and finish with a generous grating of Parmesan. Dig in.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
